command.openByPath: Office Editor: Open asset by path
topbar.title: Office Editor
prompt.assetPath: Enter an asset path, e.g. assets/example.docx
message.unsupportedFile: This file type is not supported
message.notConfigured: Please configure Bridge URL in plugin settings first.
message.bridgeUnreachable: Cannot reach Bridge at {{url}} ({{error}}). Is the service running?
message.pdfNoEdit: PDF editing is not supported. Opening in preview mode.
message.mobilePreviewOnly: Editing is not supported on mobile. Opening in preview mode.
message.fileSyncInProgress: This file is still syncing from a previous session. Please wait a moment.
message.uploadFailed: Failed to upload document to Bridge: {{error}}
message.upload404Hint: Bridge returned HTTP 404. Verify Bridge URL is correct (usually port 27689), not ONLYOFFICE URL: {{bridgeUrl}}
message.embedNoEditor: Cannot find active editor context for embedding.
message.embedInserted: Embedded Office editor into current page
settings.bridgeUrlDesc: Bridge service address on your public server, e.g. http://123.45.67.89:27689.
settings.onlyofficeUrlDesc: Browser-accessible ONLYOFFICE URL, e.g. http://123.45.67.89:27670. Leave empty to use bridge server config.
settings.bridgeSecretDesc: Must match BRIDGE_SECRET on the bridge server. Leave empty to disable.
settings.defaultModeDesc: Default mode when opening via command or right-click menu
message.syncPullPending: Detected a save event for {{name}}, but it has not been written back to SiYuan yet. Bridge cache is kept to avoid data loss. Please retry shortly.
message.syncWritebackFailed: Failed to write {{name}} back to SiYuan: {{error}}. Bridge cache is kept to avoid data loss. Please resolve the issue and retry.
message.closeBlockedUnsynced: {{name}} still has unsaved or unsynced changes. Click Save in ONLYOFFICE and wait for sync to finish before closing.
